seo.h1: Gear Ratio Calculator & Engineering Guide - AluCalc
seo.intro: Defines the speed/torque transformation between gears.
seo.step_by_step:
1. Define system parameters for Gear Ratio.
2. Consult the technical reference table for material constants.
3. Apply the AGMA Standards formula.
4. Run the post-calculation design checks.
seo.practical: In Mechanical applications, accurate Gear Ratio analysis is vital for safety and performance.
